title: keeping the update conversation private from viewers only
excerpt: We are having an issue with our privacy on Monday due to the viewers able to see the update feed on each item. It would be amazing if we could keep that private for the full access team members and not have the viewers o…

posts.author: skgallant (Sarah Gallant)
posts.cookedHtml: We are having an issue with our privacy on Monday due to the viewers able to see the update feed on each item. It would be amazing if we could keep that private for the full access team members and not have the viewers on our account able to see that.
